name: gsb-ai-data-driven-case03-fixed-length-job-poc
description: Case 03: Fixed-length file parsing - S3 single-column text source with SUBSTR extraction to S3 gzip CSV
codeGenConfigurationNodes: {"node-1":{"S3CsvSource":{"AdditionalOptions":{"EnableSamplePath":false,"SamplePath":""},"Escaper":"\\","Exclusions":[],"Name":"S3 Text Source - case03_fixed_length","OptimizePerformance":false,"OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[{"Name":"value","Type":"string"}]}],"Paths":["s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/preparing/case03_fixed_length/"],"QuoteChar":"quote","Recurse":true,"Separator":"tab","WithHeader":false}},"node-2":{"SparkSQL":{"Inputs":["node-1"],"Name":"SQL Query","OutputSchemas":[{"Columns":[]}],"SqlAliases":[{"Alias":"myDataSource","From":"node-1"}],"SqlQuery":"SELECT TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 1, 20)) AS LOAN_ACCOUNT_ID, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 21, 100)) AS ACCOUNT_NAME, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 121, 10)) AS CUSTOMER_ID, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 131, 80)) AS CUSTOMER_NAME, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 211, 1)) AS ACCOUNT_TYPE, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 212, 5)) AS PRODUCT_CODE, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 217, 2)) AS LOAN_TYPE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 219, 10)), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS START_DATE, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 229, 10)), ''), 'yyyy-MM-dd') AS END_DATE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 239, 16)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS PRINCIPAL_AMOUNT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 255, 16)), '') AS DECIMAL(18,2)) AS OUTSTANDING_AMOUNT, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 271, 5)), '') AS DECIMAL(5,2)) AS INTEREST_RATE, CAST(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 276, 3)), '') AS SMALLINT) AS TERM_MONTHS, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 279, 1)) AS PAYMENT_FREQUENCY, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 280, 2)) AS CURRENCY, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 282, 5)) AS BRANCH_CODE, TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 287, 80)) AS BRANCH_NAME, TO_DATE(NULLIF(TRIM(SUBSTR(value, 367, 10)), ''), 'yyyyMMdd') AS VERSION_DATE, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP() AS ETL_UPDATE_DATE FROM myDataSource WHERE LENGTH(TRIM(value)) > 0"}},"node-3":{"S3DirectTarget":{"AutoDataQuality":{"IsEnabled":false},"Compression":"gzip","Format":"csv","Inputs":["node-2"],"Name":"S3 Gzip CSV Target - case03_fixed_length","NumberTargetPartitions":"0","PartitionKeys":[],"Path":"s3://gsb-ai-data-driven-data-nonprod-201064226169/staging/case03_fixed_length/load/","SchemaChangePolicy":{"EnableUpdateCatalog":false}}}}
